title: Crown
full_title: Crown by ¥ellow Bucks (Ft. Awich & Masta Simon)
lyrics:
[¥ellow Bucks「Crown ft. Masta Simon & Awich」歌詞]

[Intro: Masta Simon]
We the realest
本物は本物を知る
Real Recognize Real
誰でも被れるわけではない
Real Eyes Realize Real Lies
We wear the bomboclott Crown
(Space Dust Club)

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Buss it 札の壁が
高すぎて外野の声が聞こえねえ
選ばれし者 I say fuck that
概念ぶち壊したから手に入れた称号
I got the crown, I got the crown, I got the crown
Made in Japan and we got the plan and It's goin down
You got the crown, I got the crown, who got the crown?
We got the crown and we got the fans and royalty

[Verse 1: ¥ellow Bucks]
そのやり方じゃ18金でも錆びちまいそうだ
お前の彼女オレの王宮にでも連れて行こうか
格の違い Take the throne
鳴り止むことを知らねえぜ
Big deals on my phone
左手 I got the crown
I got a bag
It's weighting me down
Me and Awich never go down
Do my thang 一心不乱
振る舞いが証明書だ
ベラベラとは喋らねぇ
GangastaぶったりRichぶるのが
ラッパーの仕事ならばくだらねぇ
ドラマ知らずはやたらと起こしたがるハプニング
オレは起きたハプニングをドラマにするPlayer
I am the king bitch

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Buss it 札の壁が
高すぎて外野の声が聞こえねえ
選ばれし者 I say fuck that
概念ぶち壊したから手に入れた称号
I got the crown, I got the crown, I got the crown
Made in Japan and we got the plan and It's goin down
You got the crown, I got the crown, who got the crown?
We got the crown and we got the fans and royalty

[Verse 2: Awich]
Yaw I got Japan on lock ない間違い
Queenの御一行引き連れるbunch of baddies
女神の行先阻むな罰当たり
お前のボス呼んでこい Ho hurry hurry
どこのTownもVIP lounge
I do not fuck with the clowns
みんなDrown into my sounds
揺れる揺れろ bounce
辛さ乗り越え顔あげsmile
俯いたてたら王冠は被れない Alright?
QueenならQueenの仕事をGet it done
誰が何と言おうと私の出番
勝利を祝い帰る時には
島の子全員に被せる Crowns yup

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Buss it 札の壁が
高すぎて外野の声が聞こえねえ
選ばれし者 I say fuck that
概念ぶち壊したから手に入れた称号
I got the crown, I got the crown, I got the crown
Made in Japan and we got the plan and It's goin down
You got the crown, I got the crown, who got the crown?
We got the crown and we got the fans and royalty

[Outro: Masta Simon]
Only the real kings
Only the real queens
Wear the Mighty Mighty Crown
